title: Numbered Process Steps v1
description: Input contract for numbered-process-steps family graphical pattern templates. Compatible with content authored as embedded 'items' (strings), 'steps' (dicts), or legacy 'items' + optional 'bodies'.

items.description: Step items. Each element may be a plain string (legacy) or an object with title/body/number fields.

steps.description: Explicit steps array (alternative to 'items'). Each step has title, optional body, optional number.

titles.description: Legacy parallel titles array (paired with items by index).

bodies.description: Legacy parallel bodies array (paired with items by index).
